articles.title: Microsoft is disabling Office 2019 for Mac next month - The Verge
articles.description: A certificate issue means Office 2019 for Mac users won’t be able to edit or save documents starting July 13th.

articles.title: Logitech’s new Mobi Fold squeezes a lot of functionality into a tiny folding mouse - The Verge
articles.description: Logitech’s new Mobi Fold is a compact travel mouse that manages to get even smaller by folding in half without skimping on features.

articles.title: Nintendo Shares Slide After 2026 Game Showcase Disappoints - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Nintendo Co.’s shares fell by the most in a month after the game maker’s presentation of upcoming games came up short on brand-new titles from heavyweight franchises such as Mario.
